headline: American Electric Power to Release Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AEP's Q1 results may be supported by strong rate-based growth and higher transmission revenues, alongside rate revisions and rising load demand.

headline: American Electric Power: Attractive Transmission Exposure But Elevated Valuations
summary: AEP is attractively positioned to secular growth drivers due to its geography and its transmission-heavy exposure. Read more on AEP stock here.

headline: Countdown to AEP (AEP) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for AEP (AEP), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: U.S. Electric Utilities Step Up Spending To Power Energy Boom
summary: US electric and gas utilities are preparing for a sharp acceleration in capital spending in 2026. Read why U.S. electric utilities step up spending to power energy boom here.
